title: Fuzz finding: ammonia panics on rel attribute in tag_attributes (sanitize.rs)
description: Fuzzing fuzz_sanitize found that ammonia 4.x panics with an assertion failure when rel is included in tag_attributes for the a tag. ammonia 4.x manages rel internally (adds noopener noreferrer automatically). Fix: remove rel from the allowed attribute set. This panic is reachable on any code path that calls sanitize_html(), which includes all inbound content processing.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
